languages.text: "Ага". {n}Завидев непонимание на вашем лице, Янур все же продолжает.{/n} "Это кладбище наше. Для нас даже человеческое тело — ресурс и ценность. Впрыскиваем в саван-листья нужные яды и прочие соки, чтобы на выходе получить... что-то. Питательную пасту, или маскирующую мазь, или клей... да много чего".

"That's right." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... something good. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."
languages.original_text: "Ага". {n}Завидев непонимание на вашем лице, Янур все же продолжает.{/n} "Это кладбище наше. Для нас даже человеческое тело — ресурс и ценность. Впрыскиваем в саван-листья нужные яды и прочие соки, чтобы на выходе получить... что-то. Питательную пасту, или маскирующую мазь, или клей... да много чего".

We inject certain poisons, and other secretions into the leaf shrouds to produce... something. Nutrient paste, camouflage balm, or glue... and much more besides."

languages.text: « Eh oui. » {n}Remarquant votre air confus, Janur continue.{/n} « C'est notre cimetière. Même les cadavres ont une utilité pour nous. Nous injectons certains poisons et autres extraits dans les linceuls de feuilles pour produire... des ressources. De la pâte nutritive, de l'onguent de camouflage, de la colle... et bien d'autres choses encore. »
languages.original_text: "Yep." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... stuff. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."

traits.locale_text: « Eh oui. » {n}Remarquant votre air confus, Janur continue.{/n} « C'est notre cimetière. Même les cadavres ont une utilité pour nous. Nous injectons certains poisons et autres extraits dans les linceuls de feuilles pour produire... des ressources. De la pâte nutritive, de l'onguent de camouflage, de la colle... et bien d'autres choses encore. »

languages.text: «Sí». {n}Al ver la confusión en tu rostro, Janur continúa.{/n} «Ese es nuestro cementerio. Incluso los cuerpos humanos son recursos valiosos para nosotros. Inyectamos ciertos venenos y otros extractos en las hojas sudario para producir... cosas. Pasta nutritiva, ungüento de camuflaje, pegamento... Muchas cosas».
languages.original_text: "Yep." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... stuff. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."

traits.locale_text: «Sí». {n}Al ver la confusión en tu rostro, Janur continúa.{/n} «Ese es nuestro cementerio. Incluso los cuerpos humanos son recursos valiosos para nosotros. Inyectamos ciertos venenos y otros extractos en las hojas sudario para producir... cosas. Pasta nutritiva, ungüento de camuflaje, pegamento... Muchas cosas».

languages.text: “没错。”{n}注意到你脸上的困惑，雅努尔又补充道。{/n}“那是我们的墓园。对我们来说，哪怕是人的尸体，也是有价值的资源。我们会向树叶裹尸布里注入特定的毒素和别的提取物，来生产出……一些东西。营养糊、伪装膏，或是粘合剂……诸如此类的东西。”
languages.original_text: "Yep." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... stuff. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."

traits.locale_text: “没错。”{n}注意到你脸上的困惑，雅努尔又补充道。{/n}“那是我们的墓园。对我们来说，哪怕是人的尸体，也是有价值的资源。我们会向树叶裹尸布里注入特定的毒素和别的提取物，来生产出……一些东西。营养糊、伪装膏，或是粘合剂……诸如此类的东西。”

languages.text: "Ja." {n}Als er dein verwirrtes Gesicht bemerkt, fährt Janur fort.{/n} "Das ist unser Friedhof. Selbst ein menschlicher Leichnam ist für uns ein Rohstoff und Objekt von Wert. Wir injizieren bestimmte Gifte und andere Extrakte in Blätter und erzeugen so ... Zeug. Nährpaste, Tarnsalben, Leim ... viele Dinge."
languages.original_text: "Yep." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... stuff. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."

traits.locale_text: "Ja." {n}Als er dein verwirrtes Gesicht bemerkt, fährt Janur fort.{/n} "Das ist unser Friedhof. Selbst ein menschlicher Leichnam ist für uns ein Rohstoff und Objekt von Wert. Wir injizieren bestimmte Gifte und andere Extrakte in Blätter und erzeugen so ... Zeug. Nährpaste, Tarnsalben, Leim ... viele Dinge."

languages.text: "Evet." {n}Yüzündeki kafa karışıklığını fark eden Janur devam ediyor.{/n} "Orası bizim mezarlığımız. İnsan cesedi bile bizim için bir kaynaktır, değerli bir nesnedir. Yaprak kefenlere belirli zehirler ve diğer özütleri enjekte ederek... Bir şeyler üretiriz. Besin macunu, kamuflaj merhemi tutkal... Bir sürü şey işte."
languages.original_text: "Yep." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... stuff. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."

traits.locale_text: "Evet." {n}Yüzündeki kafa karışıklığını fark eden Janur devam ediyor.{/n} "Orası bizim mezarlığımız. İnsan cesedi bile bizim için bir kaynaktır, değerli bir nesnedir. Yaprak kefenlere belirli zehirler ve diğer özütleri enjekte ederek... Bir şeyler üretiriz. Besin macunu, kamuflaj merhemi tutkal... Bir sürü şey işte."

languages.text: 「それは私たちの墓地です。人間もまた、私たちにとって貴重な資源です。葉の包みには、毒や酵素、分泌物などを注入して…何かを作り出します。栄養パウダー、カモフラージュクリーム、接着剤…他にもたくさんです」
languages.original_text: "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons, enzymes, and other secretions into the leaf shrouds to produce... something. Nutrient paste, camouflage balm, or glue... and much more besides."
